svg.text: cicgov — Azure Target Architecture (East US primary | Australia East DR)
External Callers / Upstream Systems (same as AWS — API contract preserved)
CNAME / A records → APIM gateway URL
Azure API Management (Consumption tier) + Application Gateway WAF_v2
APIM: Consumption | Gateway URL: cicgov.azure-api.net | Policies: rate-limit, auth, JWT validate
App Gateway WAF: OWASP CRS 3.2 | Custom rules | Diagnostic logs → Azure Monitor
Backend pool: cicgov-api internal listener → AKS Ingress
Azure Virtual Network — AKS Subnet / Private Subnet / DB Subnet (East US | Australia East)
Layer 4 TCP | Private IP | AKS-managed | port 80
Backed by AKS node pool | PrivateLink compatible
AKS Cluster — Azure Dpsv5 ARM (Ampere Altra) | Free mgmt plane | Workload Identity
TLS termination (if required) | Azure CNI networking
cicgov Deployment — Java / Spring Boot (Helm chart — minimal changes)
Image: cicgov:{tag} | Port: 8080 | arch: arm64 (Dpsv5) | Replicas: 1
CPU req: 0.1 / limit: 1 | Mem req: 1Gi / limit: 2Gi | readOnly rootFS
HPA: min=1 max=4 | CPU avgUtil=75% | Azure KEDA (optional)
Cache: dual (Caffeine + Redis) | Azure Cache for Redis (replaced in-cluster Redis)
Config: Azure App Configuration (replaces SSM) | Key Vault CSI driver
SA: cicgov → Workload Identity (Entra Managed Identity)
secretsManager_region → Azure Key Vault endpoint | dynamodb_region → Cosmos region
K8s Secrets — Azure Key Vault CSI Driver
IDP client secrets (replaces Kubernetes Secrets manual)
NSG: allow App GW subnet → AKS nodes
Azure Functions / Container Apps (replaces Lambda — Private VNet integration)
Messaging — Azure Service Bus Standard (replaces SQS + SNS)
Topics with subscriptions replace SNS fan-out + SQS filter policies
AMQP protocol | TLS | Managed Identity auth | Dead-letter queues
Geo-redundancy: Standard supports message duplication (Premium for geo-DR)
Service Bus Topics and Queues (8 queues → subscriptions + queues)
NOTE: All queues/subscriptions use Managed Identity. No shared access keys.
DLQ auto-enabled | Message lock duration: matches SQS visibility_timeout
Message retention: 7 days (Standard) | Encryption: Microsoft-managed (Key Vault optional)
Filter policies → SQL filter expressions on Service Bus subscriptions
Cross-org messaging: Shared Access Signature or Federated Identity
Azure Cosmos DB — NoSQL API (replaces DynamoDB)
Serverless (or 400 RU/s provisioned) | PITR | SSE (customer-managed key via Key Vault)
PK mapping: DynamoDB PK/SK → Cosmos partitionKey + id | GSI → composite index / computed property
Azure Key Vault + Managed Identity (replaces KMS + IRSA + SSM)
Key Vault: 3 RSA keys (replaces 3 KMS CMKs) | RBAC auth | Key rotation
Managed Identity: cicgov-mi → RBAC roles on SB, Cosmos, Key Vault, Redis | Workload Identity Federated
Azure Entra ID / Azure AD + App Configuration (replaces HxP IdP + SSM)
App Registrations for token-exchange, e2e, config-api | OIDC federation to HxP IdP possible
App Configuration: /cicgov/* params (replaces /cicgov/* SSM) | Feature Flags integration
Diagnostic settings → APIM, App GW, AKS
Terraform: azurerm provider (replaces AWS provider) | Spacelift multi-cloud support
Stacks: cicgov-networking, cicgov-aks, cicgov-messaging, cicgov-data (same structure)
Environments: dev (East US) / staging (East US) / prod (East US + Australia East geo-pair)
Note: prod-au → Australia East | prod-eu not yet deployed → provision in West Europe
Bicep / Terraform parity recommended for team cross-training
